name: FDCTECH, INC.
summary: FDCTech, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated financial technology company providing software solutions and business services to OTC brokerages and financial services industries. Its flagship Condor Trading Technology supports multi-asset trading, risk management, and pricing for forex, equities, commodities, and digital assets. Through subsidiaries AML (Malta), APL (UK), ADS (Australia), and ATECH (Cyprus), the company operates across investment brokerage, wealth management, and technology segments globally.

products.name: Condor Trading Technology
products.description: Flagship multi-asset trading, risk management, and pricing platform for forex, equities, commodities, and digital assets.

products.name: Condor Pro Multi-Asset Trading Platform
products.description: Regulatory-grade trading platform for day traders and retail investors with risk management and pricing engine.

products.name: Condor Risk Management Back Office
products.description: Back office risk management software meeting MiFID II/MiFIR regulatory requirements.

products.name: Condor Pricing Engine
products.description: Pricing engine providing best bid/ask connectivity to multiple liquidity providers or market makers.

products.name: Digital Assets Web Trader Platform
products.description: Web-based trading platform for digital assets.

products.name: Condor Back Office API
products.description: API integrating third-party CRM and banking systems into Condor Back Office.

products.name: Condor Investing & Trading App
products.description: Simplified mobile trading platform for stocks, ETFs, and other financial markets; expected commercialization Q4 2025.

products.name: Start-Your-Own Brokerage (SYOB)
products.description: Turnkey business solution for launching new brokerage operations.

products.name: Start-Your-Own Prime Brokerage (SYOPB)
products.description: Turnkey business solution for launching prime brokerage operations.

products.name: FX/OTC Liquidity Solutions
products.description: Consulting and liquidity solutions for forex and OTC markets.
